title: A question on the FoL and FoK
display_title: A question on the FoL and FoK
wikitext:
[]: A question on the FoL and FoK...             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Tue May 22, 2007 12:00 pm See, I probably shouldn't be seriously discussing Eva without clearing this up <_< I know they stand for Fruit of Life and Fruit of Knowledge. But I hear both being referenced by you guys in direct accordance to the series; how are these a direct plot device and not some allegorical religious reference that means something else that may or may not even be factual? Just curious.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Tue May 22, 2007 1:46 pm The titles are just religious terms for two things of very real importance in NGE. The FoL is the S2 engine possessed by the Angels. It's what gives them their regenerative capabilities. It's suggested that the FoK is man's wisdom, but whether its a tangible, physical thing like the S2 or an intangible thing is up for debate. It's been suggested that the FoK might be Lilim DNA, but that's only speculation. It appears that the creation of Sho as a SoL in EoE happened because of her possessing both "fruits". It's never made clear why this happens though. Nor is the difference between Adam and Lilith and their involvment with the fruits made clear.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu May 24, 2007 9:15 pm wow.......this is really confusing now the FoL and the FoK was that thing that Unit-01 got when it became that giant red thing in EoE, right?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Fri May 25, 2007 12:16 am No. It had the FoK all along. Speculation abounds as to what the FoK actually is. Some say Sho got it from Yui's soul. I like the idea that somehow she got it from being "born" (or whatever) from Lilith. But Sho definitely got the FoL when it devoured Zeruel's S2 in ep. 19. It seems that because she obtained both, the Lance touched her in *some* special way for some reason in EoE.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri May 25, 2007 12:24 am to initiate 3I?

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Fri May 25, 2007 12:34 am Sachiel_13 wrote: to initiate 3I?

[]:             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Fri May 25, 2007 8:18 am Eva Yojimbo wrote: Sachiel_13 wrote: to initiate 3I?

[]:             Quote Post by ObsessiveMathsFreak » Fri May 25, 2007 7:44 pm I believe that specifically the Fruit of Knowladge is referring to the power of science, a power that man has. This comes up during Gendou and Fuyutsuki's chat in the south pole.

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Fri May 25, 2007 8:13 pm ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: I believe that specifically the Fruit of Knowladge is referring to the power of science, a power that man has. This comes up during Gendou and Fuyutsuki's chat in the south pole.

[]:             Quote Post by marmotgirl » Fri May 25, 2007 8:40 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: And if that's the case, it would make sense that all the main Evas had it...

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri May 25, 2007 8:49 pm Eva Yojimbo wrote: ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: I believe that specifically the Fruit of Knowladge is referring to the power of science, a power that man has. This comes up during Gendou and Fuyutsuki's chat in the south pole.

[]:             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Fri May 25, 2007 9:00 pm BrikHaus wrote: Eva Yojimbo wrote: ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: I believe that specifically the Fruit of Knowladge is referring to the power of science, a power that man has. This comes up during Gendou and Fuyutsuki's chat in the south pole.

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Fri May 25, 2007 10:34 pm Opteron-O3 wrote: Well then this goes with Asukas mom also since she was a scientist as well... It might be more than just the person...

[]:             Quote Post by Eva Yojimbo » Fri May 25, 2007 10:42 pm BrikHaus wrote: But Eva-02 didn't have an S2 organ, so no Fruit of Life. Eva-02 was not as important as Eva-01 because it did not have both "Fruits."

[]:             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Fri May 25, 2007 10:46 pm BrikHaus wrote: Opteron-O3 wrote: Well then this goes with Asukas mom also since she was a scientist as well... It might be more than just the person...

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat May 26, 2007 10:53 am ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: I believe that specifically the Fruit of Knowladge is referring to the power of science

[]:             Quote Post by BrikHaus » Sat May 26, 2007 11:23 am Anonymous_Evafan wrote: ObsessiveMathsFreak wrote: I believe that specifically the Fruit of Knowladge is referring to the power of science

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sat May 26, 2007 2:07 pm BrikHaus wrote: Well, the Angels don't have it, so who else is left? Trees? ;)

[]:             Quote Post by Opteron-O3 » Sat May 26, 2007 2:13 pm Power of Science = Knowledge.

[]:             Quote Post by Anonymous_Evafan » Sun May 27, 2007 3:29 pm Opteron-O3 wrote: Power of Science = Knowledge.
summary: []: A question on the FoL and FoK...             Quote Post by Trigger's Elysium » Tue May 22, 2007 12:00 pm See, I probably shouldn't be seriously discussing Eva without clearing this up <_< I know they stand for Fruit of Life and Fruit of Knowledge. But I hear both being referenced by you guys in direct accordance to the series; how are these a direct plot device and not some allegorical religious reference that means something
